description: Conducting research in generative deep learning for structure-guided protein design and therapeutic discovery,collaborating with international teams to scale AI models for biotech applications.
Developed ppIRIS, a proteome-scale protein-protein interaction model that revealed 30+ experimentally validated interactions by Affinity Purification Mass Spectrometry.
Establishing novel strategies for combining evolutionary and structural data from proteins to target host-pathogen interactions, with applications in drug discovery and synthetic biology.
Teaching 'Artificial Intelligence: Fundamentals, Ethics and Governance' (ID: CSPO 24A18).
Designed the course curriculum, including lectures on AI fundamentals, ethical frameworks, and governance models, and developed case studies on responsible AI in education.
Invited and coordinated guest lectures with experts from UNESCO, INRIA, AlgorithmWatch, and other organizations.
Contributed to the European [[BEEGUARDS|https://beeguards.eu/]] and national [[ECOAPI|https://tinyurl.com/ecoapi]](ref. TED2021-131393B-I00) projects for the study of beekeeping and metagenomics.
Engineered scalable tools for genomics data handling, enabling automated conversion across multiple file formats common in bioinformatics workflows.
Analyzed 10+ large-scale NGS datasets using automated workflows, applying statistical modeling and predictive analytics for pathogen detection in honeybee populations.
Developed and published a [[deep learning tool|https://academic.oup.com/bioinformatics/article/39/11/btad645/7325354]] for drug-resistance prediction in a high impact bioinformatics journal.
Processed and analyzed multi-omics data from over 10 public datasets and hundreds of cell lines.
Awarded a highly competitive Fundación La Caixa-funded research grant under the project LCF/PR/HP20/52300003.
Established a pipeline for the virtual screening of over 300 compounds against proteins of interest in neurodevelopment.
Assisted in the design and construction of reactors for heavy metal bioaccumulation and bioleaching assays.
Contributed to the extraction, sequencing and annotation of tens of bacterial genomes.
Screened genomic data for the identification of heavy metal-resistance genes using mathematical modelling.
Contributed to the organization of the international microbiology congress Microbiotec19.
Hosted a round table between a former ASM President and over one hundred University of Coimbra students and researchers.

awards.title: GENCI Grant for GPU Computing Resources
awards.description: Awarded 25,000 GPU hours (approx. value €40k) on Jean Zay supercomputer for deep learning research in protein design and drug discovery.

awards.title: INRIA Nancy PhD Merit Competition (CORDI-S)
awards.description: Ranked 1st in the highly competitive CORDI-S PhD merit competition at INRIA Nancy, securing a prestigious PhD position in the field of AI for biotechnology.

awards.title: PhD Studentship by the ANR (French National Research Agency)
awards.description: Awarded a highly competitive PhD Studentship by the French Agence Nationale de la Recherche (ANR) to conduct research at INRIA.

awards.title: PhD Studentship by the Portuguese Foundation for Science and Technology
awards.description: Awarded a highly competitive PhD Studentship by the Portuguese Foundation for Science and Technology, ranking among the top 10 recipients — declined in favour of pursuing research abroad.

awards.title: Research Position at CNC
awards.description: Awarded a competitive research grant to work on bioinformatics projects at CNC (LCF/PR/HP20/52300003).

awards.title: Merit Board Recognition at the University of Coimbra
awards.description: Recognized among the Top 5% Students at the University of Coimbra in 2019/2020 and 2021/2022 for outstanding academic performance.

awards.title: FCTUC Student Grant for International Symposium
awards.description: Awarded an FCTUC Student Grant for outstanding academic performance to attend an international symposium in 2019.

awards.title: Second Place in National "Science at School Awards"
awards.description: Achieved second place overall in the national competition "Science at School Awards” (Ilídio Pinho Foundation) in 2018, in association with the University of Coimbra.
